title: rubus fragarioides
intro: Rubus fragarioides, also known as the dewberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The dewberry is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The dewberry can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
